    R

    rank() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Persistence.PlayerScore
    Returns the rank of the player in the match.
    receiveFood(int) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Elements.Player
    Increases the player's food reserve by the specified amount.
    receiveFood(int, String) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Elements.Player
    Receives food with a textual reason for logging.
    reconnectRoom(int, String, String, ClientConnection) - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.Lobby
    Attempts to reconnect a previously disconnected player.
    registerPlayer(String) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.GameController
    Registers a new nickname in the game model by assigning it to the first available player slot.
    removePropertyChangeListener(PropertyChangeListener) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.Game
    Removes a previously registered game state listener.
    resolveEndOfRoundEvents() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.Game
    Resolves end-of-round event effects.
    RITUAL - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.Constants.EventType
    Event related to spiritual or cultural ceremonies.
    RitualData - Class in it.polimi.Buildings.Ritual
    Data container for tracking player participation and progress in a Shamanic Ritual.
    RitualData() - Constructor for class it.polimi.Buildings.Ritual.RitualData
     
    RitualEventContext - Class in it.polimi.Abstract
    Specialized event context that includes ritual-specific data.
    RitualEventContext(List, RitualData) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Abstract.RitualEventContext
    Creates a ritual-aware context for event resolution.
    RmiClientAdapter - Class in it.polimi.Network.Client
    Adapter for the RMI transport on the client side.
    RmiClientAdapter() - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.Client.RmiClientAdapter
     
    RmiClientConnection - Class in it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI
    Per-client server-side connection object used by RMI sessions.
    RmiClientConnection(String, ClientCallbackRemote, Lobby, GameRoom, Runnable) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI.RmiClientConnection
    Creates a new RMI client connection wrapper.
    RmiGameService - Class in it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI
    RMI implementation of the game service exposed by the Mesos server.
    RmiGameService(Lobby) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI.RmiGameService
    Creates the RMI game service.
    RmiLoginRequest - Class in it.polimi.Network.RMI
    DTO for RMI login requests.
    RmiLoginRequest() - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.RMI.RmiLoginRequest
    Default constructor for serialization frameworks.
    RmiLoginRequest(String) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.RMI.RmiLoginRequest
    Creates a simple login request (Legacy).
    RmiLoginRequest(String, String, int, String) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.RMI.RmiLoginRequest
    Creates a login request with room ID and PIN.
    RmiLoginRequest(String, String, int, String, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.RMI.RmiLoginRequest
    Creates a login request with room ID, PIN, and room size.
    RmiLoginResponse - Class in it.polimi.Network.RMI
    DTO for RMI login outcomes.
    RmiLoginResponse() - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.RMI.RmiLoginResponse
    Default constructor for serialization frameworks.
    RmiLoginResponse(boolean, String) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.RMI.RmiLoginResponse
    Creates a login response.
    RmiServerAdapter - Class in it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI
    Adapter that boots and manages the RMI server-side transport.
    RmiServerAdapter(int, String, Lobby) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI.RmiServerAdapter
    Creates an adapter for the RMI transport.
    RmiVirtualView - Class in it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI
    Server-side view proxy used for RMI clients.
    RmiVirtualView(ClientCallbackRemote, Runnable) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI.RmiVirtualView
    Creates an RMI virtual view.
    ROCK_PAINTINGS - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.Constants.EventType
    Event related to artistic expression and long-term achievements.
    RockPaintings - Class in it.polimi.Events
    Represents a Rock Paintings event in the game Mesos.
    RockPaintings(Era, Position, int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Events.RockPaintings
    Constructs a RockPaintings event with specified era, position, and thresholds.
    rope - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.Constants.InventorIcon
    Rope icon.
    run() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Client.ClientThread
    The main execution loop of the thread.
    run() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.ClientHandler
    The main execution loop for the client's thread.
